news.t: 2026's Market Catalysts Can Work in Value Investors' Favor
BNY Flagship Infrastructure ETF BKGI Hits $1 Billion in AUM
The Headwinds and Tailwinds of Value Investing in 2026

holdings.infoBox: BKDV is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock at 3.94%, Applied Materials at 3.33%, UnitedHealth Group at 3.03%, Cisco Systems at 2.98%, and Amazon.com at 2.86%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon Dynamic Value ETF (BKDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, focusing on value companies of any market-cap globally. The fund seeks capital growth through a bottom-up investment approach, prioritizing intrinsic value, strong fundamentals, and positive momentum BKDV was launched on Nov 1, 2024 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
